comment.body:
The centroid of the profile is at 6735.95 (but 6710.24 is a margin of error now).
There is a little but more freeway up (to 6750) than down, bit it is insignificant.
The centroid is very much strong pivot today, especially after 2PM, it looks like a line in the sand, but it will be hard to break from either way (i mean, significantly low probability to break it).
